creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Jinja2 is the new and improved version of Jinja with tons of new
features, a simpler and faster runtime. Jinja is a sandboxed template
engine written in pure Python licensed under the BSD license. It
provides a Django-like non-XML syntax and compiles templates into
executable python code. It's basically a combination of Django
templates and python code.

WWW:    http://jinja.pocoo.org/2/

Please close:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129112
